rationale: The citing paper’s core mechanism is reliance on “follow your heart vs follow your head” in self/other goal-plan choices, while the cited paper specifically develops lay rationalism as reason-versus-feelings decision weighting and validates that construct. This construct-level alignment suggests the cited work is likely a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than a generic mention, and the match is an exact DOI link (10.1509/jmr.13.0532).
